version_description: Its acoustic version and it was performed live in the Philippines. The TAB used is correct with this version.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Man Who Cant Be Moved

content:
[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
The dawn is breaking[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
A light shining through[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
You're barely waking[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And I'm tangled up in you, yeah[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
I'm open, you're closed[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Where I follow, you'll go[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
I worry I won't see your face[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Light up again[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
Even the best fall down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Even the wrong words seem to rhyme[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
Out of the doubt that fills my mind[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I somehow find you and I collide[/tab]

 [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
 [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
I've found I'm scared to know[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I'm always on your mind[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]
Even the best fall down sometimes[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Even the wrong words seem to rhyme[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]G5/F#[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]

I'm close behind[/tab]
